page_content:
EDHD412 Infant Development (3 Credits) Infant development across domains, including perceptual, motor, cognitive, language, social and emotional functioning from pre-natal through third year of life.

EDHD413 Adolescent Development (3 Credits) Adolescent development, including special problems encountered in contemporary culture. Observational component and individual case study.

EDHD414 Development of the Scientiﬁc Mind Across the Lifespan (3 Credits) Study of the educational, cognitive, social, and cultural factors that underlie the development of the scientiﬁc mind across the lifespan. Recommended: EDHD320.
